meaning: n.泰尔福特路面(由大石与碎石作基础,再用小石经辗压坚实筑成平滑面层的一种路面)
examples: He was the only son of Paul Telford.
"Big mistake him shooting Boyd Telford," Pike was saying.
From Much Wenlock, a pretty town full of pricey houses, came a plea not to be lumped in with grittier Telford.
Telford and Wrekin Council agreed funding proposals on Thursday, to meet new government rules.
The job losses will affect factories in Leeds, Newcastle, Leicester and Barrow and Telford in Shropshire.
